reviews.comment:
Malo, pedí 3 veces atención, después de esperar y no ser atendido me fui, por esto ni siquiera cargue combustible. Para más precisión, Miércoles 21 de Junio alrededor de las 16:30 hs. No veo disposición para mejorar.

(Translated by Google)
Bad. I asked for service three times, and after waiting and not being attended to, I left. Because of this, I didn't even get fuel. To be more precise, it was Wednesday, June 21st, around 4:30 PM. I don't see any willingness to improve.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRaWJ2dG1BRRAB
